positive: A whimsical, abstract forest scene featuring stylized, geometric flora and fauna silhouettes. Central composition with a clear, navigable path winding through glowing, oversized mushrooms and fantastical, stylized trees. The color palette must be vibrant yet muted, utilizing deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, warm terracotta accents, and pops of iridescent gold. Strong contrast between the solid, matte black foreground silhouettes and the luminous, ethereal background light. Style: Modern flat design meets detailed linework illustration, perfect for a premium apparel print. Focus on clean edges, symmetry, and a sense of magical depth. Cinematic, editorial quality.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor composition, muted colors, messy, graffiti, cartoonish
